overview: HireNest Command Center is an AI-powered CRM for staffing and recruiting businesses. It centralizes vendors, clients, recruiters, candidates, and job orders with pipeline management, bench matching, and WhatsApp job intake.
features: WhatsApp job requirement text parser — paste raw text, auto-extract job details
Auto-create client records from parsed company names
Job intake modal with pre-filled review form
LPM/LPA/Per Hour rate structure on all jobs
Vendor bench management with match scoring
Kanban pipelines for all entity types
